message.content:
Explore the fixture system in this codebase. I need to understand:

1. What fixtures currently exist (look at FixtureDefs.jsx, models.js, defaults.js, tools.js, ToolbarIcons.jsx, Toolbar.jsx)
2. How fixtures are defined - their model structure, default dimensions, SVG rendering
3. How fixtures are placed (fixturePlaceHandler.js)
4. How fixtures render in 2D SVG (FixtureRenderer.jsx, FixturePreview.jsx) and 3D (objectBuilders.js, buildPreviewScene.js, buildPreviewObjects.js)
5. How fixtures are serialized/deserialized
6. The complete list of fixture types and their properties

Be very thorough - read the full content of all relevant files. I need to understand the pattern for adding a new fixture type.
